node.title: Uber India Senior Software Engineer [L5A] offer

article.title: Uber India Senior Software Engineer [L5A] offer
article.content:
Location: Bangalore
Years of Experience: 7
Current Company: FAANG


Current Compensation: ~ 70 LPA

Uber Offer:

Base: 73 + 4.26(PF) = 77.26 LPA
Performance bonus: 14.6 LPA for meets bar rating (can be upto 2x)
Stocks: 120k USD over 4 years: ~25.2 LPA
Total compensation: 1.17 cr

Other benefits: 68k annual health reimbursements, 4400 Uber ride credits per month, 4k monthly phone allowance, Uber One membership, free health insurance for spouse and kids.

Counter offers: N/A

Interview experience: https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/7043175/uber-l5a-sse-interview-experience-by-nik-qpdr/

post.content: Congrats!\nWhat did they ask in HLD?\n
Can you share ur interview experience and how much time does it take for a DSA prep for a DSA fresher ?
Could you please help with your preparation strategy. How did you prepare for HLD? Any resources for the same.
Congrats on the offer! Your current compensation seems to suggest you\'re an L4 at your current company? Can you share the interview experience, was behavioral round tricky?
